title: Scott Porter
content:
{{Actor
|image = Scott Porter.jpg
|DOB = July 14, 1979
|game = ''[[LEGO Marvel's Avengers]]''
|character = [[Winter Soldier/Manhattan Avengers Compound|Bucky Barnes/Winter Soldier]]}}
'''Matthew Scott Porter''' voiced [[Winter Soldier/Manhattan Avengers Compound|Bucky Barnes/Winter Soldier]] in ''[[LEGO Marvel's Avengers]]''.

==Trivia== 
*Scott Porter voiced [[Cyclops|Scott Summers/Cyclops]] in ''{{WPS|Marvel Anime: Wolverine}}'', ''{{WPS|Marvel Anime: X-Men}}'', ''{{WPS|Marvel Heroes (video game)|Marvel Heroes}}'' and ''{{WPS|Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced Adrian Luca in ''{{WPS|X-Men: Destiny}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced [[Scarlet Spider|Ben Reilly/Scarlet Spider]] and Synth Spiders in ''{{WPS|Ultimate Spider-Man (TV series)|Ultimate Spider-Man}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced [[Star-Lord|Peter Quill/Star-Lord]] in ''{{WPS|Guardians of the Galaxy: The Telltale Series}}'', ''{{WPS|Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order}}'', and ''{{WPS|Marvel Rivals}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced [[Winter Soldier|Bucky Barnes/Winter Soldier]] in ''{{WPS|Marvel vs. Capcom: Infinite}}'' and ''{{WPS|Marvel's Avengers (video game)|Marvel's Avengers}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced {{WPS|White Wolf (comics)|Hunter/White Wolf}} in ''{{WPS|Avengers Assemble (TV series)|Avengers Assemble}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced [[Harry Osborn]] in ''{{WPS|Marvel's Spider-Man (video game)|Marvel's Spider-Man}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced {{WPS|George Stacy}} in ''{{WPS|Spidey and His Amazing Friends}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced [[Moon Knight|Marc Spector/Moon Knight]] and {{WPS|Iceman (Marvel Comics)|Bobby Drake/Iceman}} in ''{{WPS|Lego Marvel Avengers: Mission Demolition}}''.
*Scott Porter voiced numerous {{WPS|DC Comics}} characters across various media, such as {{WPS|Barry Allen|Barry Allen/The Flash}}, {{WPS|Aquaman|Arthur Curry/Aquaman}} and more.
